result.status_detail: Component-error 'Refresh Page' rendered (~60s post-submit); identical to iter10 NOT_RENDERED — [DONE] terminator hypothesis disproved

notes: iter11 single-variable delta vs iter10: ADDED 'data: [DONE]\n\n' terminator after project_field FINISHED (env_len 429→443). Outcome identical to iter10 — Genspark Nuxt SPA navigated to /agents?id=417a5c33-... session URL (engine_intercept_fired=true: agent context created) but chat shell degraded to single 'Refresh Page' recovery button + empty input field. No chat bubble, no warning text, no '차단' string. [DONE] terminator did NOT bypass parser stall; component-error surfaces on same ~60s window. Refutes 'parser stalls waiting for stream-end signal' hypothesis; next axis should investigate event-type schema (project_field FINISHED payload shape) or post-stream DOM mount race rather than terminator presence.
